title: [Origin Realms] Hungerbar Fix
description: Makes the AppleSkin mod and resourcepacks compatible again
body:
THIS RESOURCEPACK NEEDS [ServerPackUnlocker](https://modrinth.com/mod/server-pack-unlocker) (or any other mod that fulfills its function)

The hunger bar was modified at the april fools event to better simulate the alpha dimension, unfortunately it was not fixed after the event ended.

Thanks to this resourcepack everything is back to normal, the AppleSkin mod and the hunger bar resourcepacks are compatible again! (as long as the pack is for version 1.20.2 or higher) is as simple as setting up the resourcepacks as shown in the following image

(the resourcepack used for the demonstration is [Pizza Hunger Bar by Useott](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pizza-hunger-bar))

---
